subject: Re: Quality Fit curve drop
body:
Dear Julien,

this is likely caused by thick ice (specimen thickness exceeding the 
microscope's depth of field). Nothing to worry about, this can be fixed by 
running a per-particle defocus refinement (within CTFrefine) later.

Also see: 
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0304399119303705

Best,
Chris

julien....@gmail.com schrieb am Donnerstag, 17. März 2022 um 12:57:19 UTC+1:

> Hi everyone,
>
> I have a concerned with my data :
> it seems there is a redundant drop in the quality fit curves of my data 
> set at a given spatial frequency range (5 - 7 anstrom, see screenshots).
>
> Is it something relevant or should I ignore this ?
> What could be the cause ? I do not see particular features in the  Fourier 
> space image which could explain this deviation between fit and data.
>
> Thank you,
> Julien
>
>
